session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was done:
## Summary
Standardized user-facing CLI copy from "Triggering"/"Triggered" to "Dispatching"/"Dispatched" across 4 source files and 4 test files.
### Source files changed: 1. **`src/erk/cli/commands/launch_cmd.py`** — Renamed 7 `_trigger_*` functions to `_dispatch_*`, updated module docstring, all user-facing output strings, inline comments, and Click help text 2. **`src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py`** — Updated module docstring, `current_step` variable, user-facing output strings, and inline comment 3. **`src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py`** — Updated "Triggering workflow" output, "Workflow triggered" output, PR comment body, and docstring 4. **`src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py`** — Updated output strings, `--watch` help text, and docstring step description
### Test files changed: 5. **`tests/commands/launch/test_launch_cmd.py`** — Updated 6 string assertions 6. **`tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py`** — Updated 1 string assertion 7. **`tests/commands/admin/test_plan_implement_workflow.py`** — Updated 2 string assertions 8. **`tests/unit/cli/commands/test_admin_test_workflow.py`** — Updated 1 string assertion
### Verification: - ruff: clean - pytest: 31 tests passed - grep: no remaining "Triggering" or "Workflow triggered" in `src/erk/cli/commands/`
**PR:** https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8573
